2311.reason: [The line number should be the passed 'lineNum' parameter, not Token::tokenList[Token::tokenIndex - 1].lineNum. This causes incorrect error line reporting because it always uses the previous token's line number instead of the actual error location.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The line number should be the passed 'lineNum' parameter, not Token::tokenList[Token::tokenIndex - 1].lineNum. This causes incorrect error line reporting because it always uses the previous token's line number instead of the actual error location.]
